subject: New Request: Software Developer – .NET
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from Shopgrid, a company in the e-commerce space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Software Developer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:
• .NET
• Azure
• Docker
• Kafka

Practical details:
• Start: 2020-05-30
• Duration: 18 months
• Location: Göteborg (on-site)
• Rate: up to 925 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
Ida Fredriksson
Account Manager
PeakRecruit
Tel: +46 73 566 78 90
